description: Shows a native terminal progress bar in supported terminals (iTerm2, Windows Terminal) during long-running operations.

baseline_observations.without_feature: No visual progress indicator during tool execution. Operator relies on spinner text and status line for activity indication.
baseline_observations.expected_with_feature: Native terminal progress bar renders in iTerm2 during active tool calls. Provides at-a-glance visibility into operation progress.
baseline_observations.notes: Pure UI feature. No behavioral or security impact. Only affects supported terminals; degrades gracefully in unsupported terminals.
